moments.title: World Cup Group Stage Continues
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage matches are ongoing this week across North America, with teams battling for a spot in the knockout rounds.

angles.name: Global Footy Fever
angles.copy: Morning! Ready for more World Cup action? The group stages are heating up today as teams fight for survival. Who are you backing?

angles.name: Match Day Buzz
angles.copy: Another day, another set of World Cup fixtures! Grab your snacks and get ready for some top-tier international football. Which game are you most excited for?

moments.title: Longest Day of the Year
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs tomorrow, Sunday June 21st at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Sunrise Celebration
angles.copy: It's almost here! Tomorrow is the Summer Solstice, the official start of astronomical summer. Get ready for maximum daylight!

angles.name: Embrace the Light
angles.copy: Longer evenings are officially here! The Summer Solstice arrives tomorrow, giving us the most daylight of the year. How will you make the most of it?

moments.title: Happy 77th Lionel Richie
moments.blurb: Music icon Lionel Richie, known for hits like 'Hello' and 'All Night Long', celebrates his 77th birthday today, June 20th.

angles.name: Hello, Is It Me You're Looking For?
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the one and only Lionel Richie! What's your favourite smooth classic from the legend?

angles.name: All Night Long
angles.copy: It's a party 'All Night Long' for Lionel Richie, who turns 77 today! Still bringing the funk and soul. Let's celebrate his incredible career!

moments.title: Ray Davies Turns 82
moments.blurb: Sir Ray Davies, the legendary frontman and songwriter of The Kinks, celebrates his 82nd birthday tomorrow, June 21st.

angles.name: Kinks Icon
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very happy 82nd birthday to the brilliant Sir Ray Davies! The Kinks legend gave us some of the greatest songs ever.

angles.name: Waterloo Sunset King
angles.copy: From 'You Really Got Me' to 'Waterloo Sunset', Ray Davies is a true songwriting genius. He turns 82 tomorrow – what's your favourite Kinks track?

moments.title: Cyndi Lauper's 73rd Birthday
moments.blurb: The iconic 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun' singer Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday on June 22nd.

angles.name: Girls Just Wanna Celebrate
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! The incredible Cyndi Lauper turns 73 on June 22nd. Her vibrant energy and timeless hits still make us wanna have fun!

angles.name: True Colors of a Legend
angles.copy: With a voice that spans generations and 'True Colors' that shine bright, Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday on Monday. Happy birthday to a true legend!

moments.title: Chris Isaak Turns 70
moments.blurb: The smooth-voiced 'Wicked Game' singer Chris Isaak celebrates his 70th birthday on June 26th.

angles.name: Wicked Game Turns 70
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 70th birthday to the distinctive Chris Isaak on June 26th! His 'Wicked Game' is still sending shivers down our spines.

angles.name: Smooth Operator
angles.copy: The master of cool, Chris Isaak, celebrates his 70th on Thursday! His timeless sound makes him a true icon. What's your favourite track?

moments.title: Nicole Scherzinger's 48th Birthday
moments.blurb: Former Pussycat Dolls lead singer Nicole Scherzinger, known for hits like 'Don't Cha', celebrates her 48th birthday on June 29th.

angles.name: Don't Cha Wanna Celebrate?
angles.copy: Get ready to 'Don't Cha' dance! Nicole Scherzinger turns 48 on June 29th. The Pussycat Dolls icon is still bringing the pop anthems!

angles.name: Pop Queen Reigns
angles.copy: From girl group sensation to solo star, Nicole Scherzinger celebrates her 48th on Monday! What's your favourite track from her incredible career?

moments.title: Fantasia Barrino Turns 42
moments.blurb: American Idol winner and R&B powerhouse Fantasia Barrino celebrates her 42nd birthday on June 30th.

angles.name: Idol to Icon
angles.copy: Happy 42nd birthday to the phenomenal Fantasia Barrino on June 30th! From American Idol winner to R&B superstar, she continues to inspire.

angles.name: R&B Powerhouse
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible talent of Fantasia Barrino, who turns 42 on Tuesday! Her powerful vocals and stage presence are unmatched.

moments.title: Wimbledon Championships Begin
moments.blurb: The prestigious Wimbledon Championships 2026 kick off on Monday, June 29th, bringing two weeks of world-class tennis to London.

angles.name: Tennis Time
angles.copy: Get ready for strawberries and cream! Wimbledon 2026 begins on Monday, June 29th. Who are your picks for the champions this year?

angles.name: London Calling Tennis Fans
angles.copy: The greatest tennis tournament in the world returns to London next Monday! Wimbledon 2026 is almost here. Are you heading to SW19 or watching from home?

moments.title: Glastonbury Fallow Year Confirmed
moments.blurb: Just a reminder that there is no Glastonbury Festival in 2026, as it's a planned 'fallow year' to allow Worthy Farm to recover. The festival returns in 2027.

angles.name: No Glasto This Year
angles.copy: Missing the Pyramid Stage already? Just a friendly reminder that Glastonbury Festival is taking its planned fallow year in 2026. See you in 2027!

angles.name: Worthy Farm Resting
angles.copy: While Worthy Farm takes a well-deserved break, we're already dreaming of Glastonbury 2027! What's your favourite Glasto memory?

moments.title: Summer Holidays on the Horizon
moments.blurb: School summer holidays in England and Wales are just a few weeks away, with most schools breaking up around July 20th-22nd.

angles.name: Countdown to Freedom
angles.copy: Only a few more weeks until the school summer holidays begin across England and Wales! Parents and kids, are you ready for the break?

angles.name: Summer Plans Loading
angles.copy: The countdown to summer holidays is officially on for many families! What are your big plans for the long break?
